ideal_must_detect.matched_text: a hashed facial template used for turnstile access (biometric data)
a GP referral for stress-related treatment dated 12 May 2026 (health data)
to a US subprocessor, CloudHelm Labs LLC, under legacy SCCs
reports a cyber incident detected on 04 June 2026
Systems affected included the CSRD ESRS-S1 workforce metrics and SFDR PAI mappings, with a projected one-quarter delay to assurance and potential capex reallocation to resilience

The attacker exfiltrated a subset of records via an unauthorised API token to a US subprocessor, CloudHelm Labs LLC, under legacy SCCs; a transfer impact assessment will be updated and supplementary encryption enforced per GDPR guidance.
Management currently estimates a 3–5% Q3 EBITDA impact from identity management remediation and downtime in the AuroraPay payroll module; this unpublished forecast is inside information under EU MAR.
We notified the Low Countries Data Supervisor within 72 hours and activated our breach protocol; cross-border notifications will follow for employees resident in Nordmark and Valestria.
